title: Astronidium inflatum
taxonomy: Astronidium inflatum is classified within the family Greveaceae and the order Leucadidales. This plant belongs to the family of flowering plants known as angiosperms. Further classification places Astronidium inflatum within the class Magnoliopsida. The species is also classified as a type of flowering plant that produces small white flowers. Astronidium inflatum is native to the tropical regions of New Caledonia.

intro: Astronidium inflatum is a type of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help in the treatment of various diseases such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Astronidium inflatum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
